_about: Independent, public ground-truth controls for the self-validation engine. POSITIVE controls are well-established resistance relationships (each cited to a public CARD/ARO accession or the canonical literature); the engine must recover them from GROUNDED evidence edges. NEGATIVE controls are mechanistically false or unsupported relationships; the engine must NOT assert them (0 fabrications). This checks that the grounded graph captures real biology and refuses falsehood — a property a search tool can't demonstrate.

positives.note: MarR represses marRAB; derepression drives efflux — textbook.
MarA activation → tigecycline resistance via efflux.
Efflux is collapsed by the protonophore CCCP / efflux-pump inhibitors.

negatives.reason: Vancomycin targets Gram-positive cell-wall synthesis; Burkholderia is intrinsically vancomycin-resistant via its outer membrane, not via MarR/efflux. A MarR→vancomycin resistance edge would be a fabrication.
MarR is a transcriptional regulator, not a penicillin target. Nonsense pairing.
No grounded evidence links this LysR-family regulator to tetracycline resistance. The engine must refuse, not invent.
This two-component response regulator has no grounded fluoroquinolone-resistance evidence; asserting it would be unsupported.
